title: Eureka! Balloon Popper
description: Removes the crafting recipes for balloons in Eureka!
body:
# What does this do?
This datapack has the sole purpose of disabling the crafting recipe of all balloons in [Eureka!](https://modrinth.com/mod/eureka 'Title').

# Why would you want this?
This pack was created for those who wish to include [Valkyrien Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies 'Title') & [Eureka!](https://modrinth.com/mod/eureka 'Title') in their modpacks, however they feel *flying* ships are unfitting for the experience they wish to create.

With this datapack enabled, you will be limited to creating ships that work in the water (and partially on land, there's not much that can be done to disable that to my knowledge). This can be fun for servers that wish to include the ability for players to create their own ships for sailing across the seas, but where a flying vessel would be too overpowered or would ruin the experience.

# Note
This datapack does **NOT** fully remove balloons from the game, however they should by all accounts be unobtainable in survival. The only way to obtain balloons is via commands or the creative menu, as the recipes are fully removed so they're impossible to craft.
